resources.string: Incompatible version of \"apk builder\".\nDownload it now?
Blocking operations cannot be performed on the UI thread. Try executing waitForActivity in a sub-thread or sub-script, or use setInterval to loop and check the activity
Blocking operations cannot be performed on the UI thread. Try executing waitForPackage in a sub-thread or sub-script, or use setInterval to loop and check the package
1. Press and hold the application name (AutoJs6) on the home page to jump to the settings page\n2. Press and hold a certain settings option on the settings page to view detailed information
Current theme color %1$s is configured by the color palette
A Floating Action Button widget for displaying the manifest
Failed to determine the index of the theme color item
Failed to locate the color library for the theme color
Failed to retrieve the changelog for the currently displayed language. You can try again later.\n\nFor now, the release notes for \"Simplified Chinese (zh-Hans)\" will be shown temporarily.
A web page will be launched to report an issue.\nAn account for GitHub may be needed.
Select a way of output for recorded script
Copy debugging log or exit directly
AutoJs6 is a JavaScript automated tool for android, which is open-source and cloned from \"hyb1996/Auto.js\".\n\nTo ask for help or feedback, go to GitHub issues or join Tencent QQ group 690946137.
1. Press and hold the app icon on the \"About app and developer\" page to jump to AutoJs6 developer options page

The accessibility service is AutoJs6\'s core capability for automation. It is used to read on-screen widget information and simulate interactions such as [ click / swipe / input ].\n\nMost automation-related functions, as well as tools like layout analysis, require the accessibility service to be enabled to work properly.

The \"manage all files\" (or \"all files access\") permission allows AutoJs6 to directly [ create / read / modify / delete ] files in shared storage via normal file paths, allowing scripts to access \"Internal Storage\" and enabling the file manager to display and manage files properly.\n\nOn Android 11+ devices, this is the primary way to achieve full file read/write access.
Preference for changing the display language of AutoJs6, including exception messages from running scripts.\n\nNote: an app restart may be needed to make language applied as expected.
When auto night mode is enabled, AutoJs6 will automatically switch night mode based on system settings.\n\nNote: the auto night mode toggle and the night mode toggle are linked and affect each other.

The "background pop-up" permission (also known as "background activity launch" or "launch UI from background") allows AutoJs6 to proactively start an Activity or open specific settings pages even when the app is in the background or no UI is currently visible. It is useful for scenarios such as [ opening UI when a scheduled task is triggered / resuming interaction after the device is locked or idle / opening a script configuration page from a notification or shortcut ].

Note: on systems like Xiaomi (MIUI/HyperOS) and Vivo (OriginOS/Funtouch OS), this permission may be disabled by default. Without it, attempts to open pages from the background may be blocked by the system, which can appear as [ no response / running in background only without showing UI / navigation failed ].

Even after granting it, the behavior may still be affected by other system policies such as [ battery optimizations / auto-start restrictions / background freezing / app standby ]. Consider adjusting it together with related permissions or whitelist settings.
Change the path of the directory containing scripts
AutoJs6 gets and downloads updates from GitHub.

Client mode allows AutoJs6 to actively connect to a remote server for [ script transfer / log printing / remote control ].\n\nTypically, the device and the server need to be on the same LAN or on a network where they can reach each other.

The \"display over other apps\" permission allows AutoJs6 to show floating windows or a floating button above other apps, enabling quick actions or information viewing on any screen.\n\nNote: without this permission, floating windows and the floating button may not be shown or may not work properly.

Local docs: Using AutoJs6 build-in files as documentation sources, no network connection required. The content changes as AutoJs6 is updated.
Online docs: Using GitHub pages as documentation sources, requiring network connection. The content is always up to date.

Note: To maximize the reading experience of online documents, it is recommended to use a widescreen display device such as a desktop monitor.
Note: As of version 6.2.0, the documentation is still in the preliminary stages of development, and most of the content has not yet been written or updated.

The following conditions must be met for dark theme support on document pages:
1. AutoJs6 has night mode enabled
2. Android System WebView (or browsers like Google Chrome):
- Android API Level 29 (Android 10) [Q] and above: version >= 76
- Android API Level 28 (Android 9) [P] and below: version >= 105

Extending JavaScript built-in objects can increase code flexibility and enable richer functionality, but can cause conflicts and even breakage.
All scripts have built-in extensions enabled by default when the option is turned on.
Built-in extensions are often insecure, and are not recommended unless the principles and risks of built-in extensions are clearly understood.
When the option is turned off, built-in extensions can still be enabled through the plugins global object, as described in the project documentation.
Used to set whether to show file extensions in AutoJs6 file explorer.

The floating button shows a draggable quick-entry on the screen edge, and can be used for [ starting or stopping scripts / layout analysis / viewing recent package name or activity name / showing pointer location ].\n\nNote: this feature typically requires the \"display over other apps\" permission.

Foreground service is used to keep AutoJs6 running more stably in the background, suitable for scenarios like [ long-running scripts / keeping connections / continuous listening ].

After enabling it, the system will display a "foreground service notification" to inform the user that AutoJs6 is continuously running. This notification typically stays visible until the service stops.

Setting the notification to "Silent" or "Minimize" only reduces the prominence and generally does not affect foreground service functionality.

If the notification channel is disabled or AutoJs6 is prevented from posting notifications, it may affect foreground service startup and stability.
Used to set whether to show hidden files and folders (usually starting with \".\") in AutoJs6 file explorer.

Ignoring battery optimizations can reduce system background restrictions on AutoJs6, helping scheduled tasks or long-running scripts run relatively more stably while the device is idle.\n\nNote: different OEM systems may still apply additional power-saving policies, such as auto-start restrictions or background freezing.
Used to control whether the screen stays on while AutoJs6 is in the foreground.

Preference for keeping the device\'s screen turned on and bright when AutoJs6 is in the foreground.\nTo make it happen only on the homepage among all pages of the AutoJs6 application, choose \"homepage only\" option.

Launcher icon supports both adaptive icon or legacy transparent background icon display modes. The actual display effect may vary on different Android systems. It may take a few seconds to take effect after switching display modes.

Shortcuts can perform specific actions in AutoJs6. Users can display these shortcuts in a supported launcher and quickly start some tasks or launch an activity, such as reading AutoJs6 application documentation, launching AutoJs6 settings page, and so on.
Click to view or manage list items.\nLong press to remove the list item.
Used to control and reflect AutoJs6\'s night mode strategy.\n\nNote: the night mode toggle and the auto night mode toggle are linked and affect each other.

Night mode (also known as Dark theme) applies to both the Android system UI and apps running on the device, which improves visibility for users with low vision and those who are sensitive to bright light, and makes it easier for anyone to use a device in a low-light environment.

Follow system: AutoJs6 has Night mode settings same as Android system
Always on: AutoJs6 keeps Night mode on (regardless of Android system settings)
Always off: AutoJs6 keeps Night mode off (regardless of Android system settings)

Note: Follow system option is only for Android API Level 28 (Android 9) [P] and above.

To enable Night mode in Android system:
- Android API Level 29 (Android 10) [Q] and above: Settings -> Display -> Theme.
- Android API Level 28 (Android 9) [P]: Developer options -> Night mode.

The following conditions must to met for applying a Night mode (Dark theme) to web-based content using a WebView component (like AutoJs6 documentation page):
1. Android System WebView (or browsers like Google Chrome):
- Android API Level 29 (Android 10) [Q] and above: version >= 76
- Android API Level 28 (Android 9) [P]: version >= 105
2. Web-based content in WebView component is adapted to Dark theme (by CSS or Android XML resources and so forth)
The \"notification access\" (or \"notification reading\") permission allows AutoJs6 to read system notification content, so scripts can listen for notifications or retrieve notification text, etc.

\"Pointer location\" is a debugging feature in Android Developer options.\nWhen enabled, the system will display information about touch point(s) on the screen, such as [coordinates/movement trajectory/count/size/movement speed/pressure], which helps with [writing/debugging/verification] of related scripts.

The \"post notifications\" permission allows AutoJs6 to publish notifications to the system, so scripts can post and manage custom notifications in the notification shade.\n\nNote: on Android 13+ devices, if this permission is not granted, some notifications may not show, and it may affect foreground service startup and stability.
With project media access, security warning for screen recording will not prompt.
View the release history and key category statistics of AutoJs6 on GitHub.

The restart strategy only affects the restart button in the home page drawer.

Quick restart: Quickly restarts the app. If the restart fails or unexpected situations occur, try switching to "Scheduled restart".
Scheduled restart: Sets up a short-timed task in advance. After the app stops, it will start again on schedule to achieve app restart.

Switch ON (default): results of Java methods that are instances of Number/Boolean/Character are wrapped as Java objects and exposed to scripts (String excluded). typeof is "object", species is "JavaObject"; Java methods remain accessible, which helps retain precise Java type traits and overload resolution.

Switch OFF: the above types are no longer wrapped and are exposed directly as JavaScript primitives (number/boolean/one‑character string). typeof is the corresponding JavaScript type, aligning better with JavaScript semantics and ecosystem. You can still explicitly create a Java wrapper via new, e.g. new java.lang.Boolean(true).

See: http://issues.autojs6.com/435
If you have exotic root or abnormal state for root access, you can force set root to root or non-root.
Binary type: non-editable, with the file extension \"auto\"\nJavaScript type: can be edited or copied directly, with the file extension \"js\"

When requesting screen capture permission, the permission request window may include a fade-out animation when it disappears. If `images.captureScreen` is called immediately, the captured screenshot may contain the permission request window content and be obstructed.

The current option value adds a delay (in milliseconds) before capturing the screen immediately after permission is granted, which can be used to avoid the obstruction issue described above.

This option only applies to the first screenshot after screen capture permission is granted; subsequent screenshots are not affected by this value.

Server mode allows AutoJs6 to start a service on the current device and wait for external client connections for [ script transfer / log printing / remote control ].

AutoJs6 server mode supports two connection methods:
1. LAN
2. Android Debug Bridge (ADB)
Shizuku makes it possible to uses system API with ADB privileges
Stable mode makes it more stable when getting layout bounds, but some results may be ignored.\nA11y service\'s restart required.

Theme color is applied to widgets including but not limited to the following ones:
Status bar
Appbar
File icon
Task item icon
FAB
Settings category title
Switch button

Note: As of AutoJs6 version 6.2.0, there has been no difference between primary color, primary dark color and accent color yet.

Controls the underlying mechanism for triggering scripts on a schedule.

AlarmManager: With the "Allow setting alarms and reminders" permission granted, scheduled tasks can fire closer to the exact time.
WorkManager: System-friendly; suitable for non-critical tasks that can tolerate some delay.
JobScheduler: Legacy implementation kept for compatibility; higher chance of delays.

Use cases and differences:

1. AlarmManager
Best for time-sensitive tasks, e.g., [reminders/strictly scheduled scripts/...].
On Android 12+ with the "Allow setting alarms and reminders" permission, tasks can run more on time even when the screen is off or the device is idle.
Without it, the system may degrade exactness or delay execution.

2. WorkManager
Best for tasks that don’t require strict timing, e.g., [non-critical sync/cleanup/statistics/...].
Scheduling depends on [battery/network/charging/idle policies/...], so execution may be postponed when the screen is off or idle.
While it can’t guarantee exact timing, it excels at [reliable completion/retries/chaining/unique work de-duplication].

3. JobScheduler
Historical implementation for compatibility.
On newer Android versions, tasks may be delayed more noticeably.
Generally not recommended unless required for compatibility.
Provides access to device usage history and statistics which results in currentPackage() a more accurate result

Secure system settings, containing system preferences that applications can read but are not allowed to write.\nThese are for preferences that the user must explicitly modify through the UI of a system app.\nWith secure system settings permission, normal applications can directly modify the secure settings (such as accessibility service).
The \"write system settings\" permission allows AutoJs6 to modify some system settings, so scripts can change system parameters such as [ screen brightness / auto-rotate / screen timeout ].
The content has not been saved, are you sure to exit?
Do not show hidden files or folders
Method %s has been abandoned and should not be used
The \"%1$s\" operation cannot be completed because the parameter contains negative coordinate values (%2$d, %3$d)
An activity is required, which could be provided by running in \"ui\" execution mode
At least one ABI needs to be selected
AutoJs6 version must not be lower than %1$s
AutoJs6 version number must not be lower than %1$s
Both bitmap and mat are null
Cannot convert %s into a ScriptRuntime path
Cannot find EditorView from child view: %s
Use more characters for the password
Colon must follow a valid IP address
Script recording requires at least one of the following conditions:\n- Root access\n- Shizuku access
Cannot connect to the remote server: %s
Method resume() should be called after suspend()
Method suspend() should be only called once
Corresponding GitHub release may have not been published yet
At least one broadcast must be selected
No GitHub release assets to download
Failed to apply current color history
Failed to change the toggle state
Failed to convert value %s into a Drawable
Failed to open the settings page
Failed to retrieve the release history
Failed to retrieve version.properties to parse version information
File in path \"%1$s\" does not exist
UI thread cannot be blocked. Try running %s() in sub-thread or sub-script
Relative URL cannot be used without base URL
Result type \"%s\" is not supported for UiObject
URL must starts with a protocol like \"https://\" and so forth
Parameter %s (%s) must be or can be cast to %s type
Images must have the same size
Images must have the same size and type
IP address can not be empty
IPv6 port must be specified as \"[ipv6]:port\".
AutoJs6 may not have root access to run \"auto\" file
Method only accepts a number of arguments in the range [%1$d\.\.%2$d]
Missing required plugin for \"%1$s\". Please install the plugin and try again.
The \"%s\" module does not work due to the lack of necessary library files
Accessibility service is disabled and the script has stopped
No applications available for browsing this link
No applications available for editing this file
No applications available for installing this file
No applications available for playing this file
No applications available for sending this file
No applications available for viewing this file
No available enabled %1$s plugin variants found (%2$s).
No available URL provided for current plugin
No embedded Paddle OCR assets found. Please re-package with Paddle OCR enabled.
No enabled plugin for \"%1$s\". Please enable a plugin and try again.
ScrollView can host only one direct child
Failed to parse GitHub release assets
Plugin APK does not contain required assets for variant=\"%1$s\": %2$s.
Plugin APK does not contain required native libraries: %1$s.
Plugin \"%1$s\" is not authorized in Plugin Center
Plugin \"%1$s\" is not enabled in Plugin Center
Plugin \"%1$s\" not found in installed apps
Project main script file \"%1$s\" does not exist
Required property \"%1$s\" is nullish or does not exist
Resolved path for \"%1$s\" cannot be null
Selector method should be called rather than passed as a parameter: %s
Cannot use a compass when result type is selector
Cannot set both iconRes and icon
Shizuku service may be not running
Specified AutoJs6 version number must be greater than 461
The transformer for required property \"%1$s\" cannot return nullish
Current file path is unknown, unable to display file details
Current file path is unknown, unable to display version history
Current file path is unknown, unable to open with other apps
Current file path is unknown, unable to package application
Current file path is unknown, unable to save file
Format WebP-Lossless cannot be compressed with a quality parameter, use JPEG/PNG/WebP-Lossy instead
File does not exist or readable
File does not exist or readable: %s
Regex is supported. Use \"$1\" - \"$9\" for captured groups.
IPv4, IPv6 and domain are supported.
Try clicking the \"Activate\" button to activate the plugin once.\nIf activation is successful, the button will automatically turn on within a certain period of time.
Enter a URL pointing to a remote plugin address.\nFor example \"https://example.com/plugin.apk\".
\"Blob\" thread request successful, writing offline cache
Local asset file is latest version
Local data is newer, stop analyzing online data
Offline cache file is latest version
\"Raw\" thread request successful, writing offline cache
AutoJs6 has no root access to record a script
Are you sure to ignore current update version?\nYou can manage all ignored versions by app settings.
The current file may not be a valid plugin package, do you want to continue with installation?\n\nURI: \"%1$s\"
An app restart is needed to apply new settings
An app restart may be needed to make language applied as expected
This notification is being displayed for capturing screen
Allows AutoJs6 to access all files, including those in external storage
Allow the application to access all files, including external storage
Allows AutoJs6 to display content over other apps
Allow the application to display content over other apps
Enable accessibility service with root access automatically when needed
Enable accessibility service with secure settings automatically when needed
Increase code flexibility and enable richer functionality by extending JavaScript built-in objects
The foreground service helps keep the app and scripts running more reliably in the background
Prevent automation actions from scripts when AutoJs6 is in the foreground
Run script directly without showing main activity
Allows AutoJs6 to create and post notifications
Allow the application to create and send notifications
Show message when starting or stopping recording a script
Java primitive types will be wrapped as Java objects in scripts
More stable layout analysis but worse code compatibility (a11y service restarting needed)
Start or stop recording controlled by \"Volume Down\" key when floating button is showing
Press \"Volume Up\" key to stop all running scripts
Required by the script automatic operation (click, long press, slide, etc.).
Accessibility service enabled but not running (Re-enable or reboot the device)
\"All files access\" is needed to access script files on the phone
Granting the \"Allow setting alarms and reminders\" permission is recommended to help tasks run as punctually as possible even when the screen is off or the device is idle
Already copied to clipboard (only latest %d items)
At least one field from [Full Name, Organization Name, Organizational Unit, Country Code, State or Province, City or Locality, Street] must be filled
This is a third-party plugin. Please pay attention to the plugin source and usage safety.\n\nClick the \"Authorize\" button to enable the plugin.
Check for updates automatically and show a snackbar on homepage
Checked fields are saved as fixed values in this profile.
Cannot use reserved profile names (Default, project.json)
Current build configuration has unsaved changes.
Current build configuration has unsaved changes and will be written to project.json.
Some dependency or local library version adjustments
Check for updates (ignore the local version)
Fetch the latest remote version directly when checking for updates
Click icon to add launcher shortcut
Click an item to view details
Click other areas to exit selection
Are you sure to clear all items?
Are you sure to clear the history?

The history below will be cleared

[ %1$s ]

Are you sure to clear?

All history entries below will be cleared

[ All color libraries ]

Are you sure to clear them all?
Copy all files to new directory
Source path is the same as destination path. Continue copying?\n\nNew name: \"%1$s\".
Country code must be two capital letters
Default profile cannot be overwritten, you can create a new aliased profile
\"Display over other apps\" permission is recommended to make all widgets displayed properly
Time should be later than now
Don\'t ask again for this version
Download and install the version of AutoJs6 that includes the above ABI (the file name contains \"%s\")
Download and install the version of AutoJs6 that includes all ABIs (the file name contains \"universal\")
Current downloading will be interrupted if continue
Enable accessibility service with root access automatically
Enable accessibility service with root access timed out
Enable accessibility service with secure settings automatically
Enable accessibility service with secure settings timed out
Failed to enable accessibility service with root access
Failed to enable accessibility service with secure settings
Failed to grant display over other apps permission
Failed to save remote project to local storage
File \"%1$s\" is not an executable script
Filename cannot contain the following characters: \\ / : * ? " < > |
Grant AutoJs6 access in Shizuku app
Whether the hidden files and folders show or not in file explorer. A file or folder is considered to be hidden if its name begins with a period character (\".\").
A profile named \"%1$s\" already exists, please choose an import strategy:
IP address \"%1$s\" has a special purpose (loopback/broadcast/multicast/reserved/...), so it may not be usable for connecting to the target server.
Keep screen on when in foreground
Switching launcher icons on some devices may cause all existing AutoJs6 shortcuts to be lost, please proceed with caution
Source path is the same as destination path, move aborted.
Move all files to new directory
New path is same as old path
No plugins currently installed.\nClick the \"+\" button to install plugins.
Current configuration is empty.\nTap here to create a symbol.
Number of log entries %d exceeds the limit for sending
Only latest %d items will be sent
Password must be at least %d characters long
Allow the app to access approximate location via network
Allow the app to access precise location via GPS
Allow the app to access extra commands for location providers
Allow the app to view network connection status
Allow the app to access Wi-Fi state
Allow the app to perform in-app purchases
Allow the app to access Bluetooth devices
Allow the app to configure Bluetooth devices
Allow the app to advertise via Bluetooth
Allow the app to access Bluetooth devices and connection state
Allow the app to scan for nearby Bluetooth devices
Allow the app to send an intent to close system dialogs
Allow the app to make phone calls
Allow the app to access the camera
Allow the app to capture video output
Allow the app to change network state
Allow the app to change Wi-Fi multicast state
Allow the app to change Wi-Fi state
Allow the app to disable screen lock
Allow the app to dump system information
Allow the app to expand/collapse status bar
Allow the app to control the flashlight
Allow the app to run foreground services
Allow the app to use screen recording and media projection in foreground services
Allow the app to perform special operations in foreground services
Allow the app to access accounts on the device
Allow the app to install shortcuts
Allow the app to interact across users
Allow the app to access the internet
Allow the app to terminate background processes
Allow the app to manage all files in external storage
Allow the app to manage users
Allow the app to modify audio settings
Allow the app to format external storage
Allow the app to mount/unmount file systems
Allow the app to communicate with NFC devices
Allow the app to post notifications
Allow the app to query all packages
Allow the app to read calendar events
Allow the app to read contacts
Allow the app to read from external storage
Allow the app to read audio files from shared storage
Allow the app to read image files from shared storage
Allow the app to read video files from shared storage
Allow the app to read phone state and identity
Allow the app to access all phone state information
Allow the app to read SMS messages
Allow the app to receive broadcast when device boot completes
Allow the app to receive SMS messages
Allow the app to record audio
Allow the app to reorder running applications
Allow the app to request deletion of packages
Allow the app to request ignoring battery optimizations
Allow the app to request installation of other apps
Allow the app to schedule time-precise operations
Allow the app to send SMS messages
Allow the app to set wallpaper
Allow the app to set wallpaper size hints
Allow the app to interact with the system with elevated permissions via Shizuku service
Allow the app to display over other apps
Allow running commands (specific to Termux app)
Allow the app to uninstall shortcuts
Allow the app to show unlimited Toast notifications
Allow the app to schedule exact alarms or event reminders
Allow the app to control phone vibration
Allow the app to prevent the phone from going to sleep
Allow the app to add or modify calendar events
Allow the app to modify contacts
Allow the app to write to external storage
Allow the app to read/write secure system settings
Allow the app to modify system settings
Allow the app to access usage statistics of other apps
Pinning shortcuts to launcher is not supported
Please wait a moment before trying again...
Toggle \"pointer location\" failed.\nRoot access is required.
To ensure that AutoJs6 foreground services, etc. can work properly and that scripts can post notifications, AutoJs6 must be granted the \"post notifications\" permission.
Press again to dismiss the dialog
An explorer page swipe-to-refresh may be needed
Remote file saved to local storage successfully
Remote project saved to local storage successfully
Remove this item from trash permanently?
Requires Android OS version %s (API %s) but current is %s (API %s)
Revoke AutoJs6 access in Shizuku app
Set a name for the new configuration
Shizuku service may need to be run first
The following solutions can be referred to
The transparent background launcher icon may be automatically masked or given a background by the system, so the actual effect may vary across different devices
The selected ABI \"%s\" cannot be used to create a packaged application, because the current version of AutoJs6 does not include the above ABI.
The feature will be ready to use in the next few updates
Use \"Volume Down\" key to control recording
Use \"Volume Up\" key to control the script running
Restoring only changes the editor content. It will not automatically save to the file. Please tap the Save button manually.
The version of the VSCode extension does not meet the requirements
Waiting for all data processing to complete...
At least one day must be selected
Display pop-up windows while running in the background
The settings has not been saved, are you sure to continue the operation?
The settings has not been saved, are you sure to exit?
